intro: The Minnesota Vikings have a ton of options in the first round of the 2021 NFL Draft. Their three biggest needs entering the three-day event are offensive tackle, guard, and edge pass rusher, with all three needs expected to be addressed over the course of the three-day event. Outside of those needs, there are other spots the team could use help in a major way. Depth and competition would go a long way at every position on offense, defense, and special teams, meaning there is almost no position the team wouldn’t consider when they are on the clock in nearly every round.

description: Minnesota Vikings 5-round 2021 mock draft: Post-Pro Day : Pro days have finished up and now is a good time to see how the picks could unfold for the Minnesota Vikings in the 2021 NFL Draft. - Page 2
intro: The 2021 NFL Draft is just around the corner. The Senior Bowl, free agency, and now pro days have all completed and all there is to do is sit tight and listen to all the rumors that will come out between now and April 29th. The Vikings attended many of these pro days where Rick Spielman got an up and close look at plenty of prospects that could help the Vikings out this year and even more so down the road. With the moves the Vikings made in free agency, it looks like all they really have left to do is improve the offensive line and that is where they could go with the majority of their early picks.

description: Vikings Mock Draft 2021: Mike Zimmer attacks defense | PFN : In this 7-Round Vikings 2021 Mock Draft, Mike Zimmer and company commit to rebuilding the Minnesota defense from the ground up.
intro: The Minnesota Vikings were in the playoff race for the majority of the 2020 season. They own one of the best skill-position groups in the NFL. Adam Thielen and Justin Jefferson make up a deadly receiving pair while Dalvin Cook is in the debate for best running back in the league. Kirk Cousins is fresh off a statistically stellar season, and Irv Smith Jr. is ready to become the team’s top tight end after sitting behind Kyle Rudolph early in his career. Adding depth at the receiving positions will be a priority on Day 3 of this 7-Round Vikings 2021 Mock Draft.

description: Vikings 2021 NFL Mock Draft: Kirk Cousins gets upgrade in protection : The Minnesota Vikings suffered through a setback in 2020. Can they get back on track with a strong 2021 NFL Draft? Let's see here. - Page 2
intro: Going into the 2020 season there were a lot of questions as to whether the Minnesota Vikings could be as successful offensively as they had been previously when Kevin Stefanski was calling plays. Stefanski left after the 2019 season to become the head coach of the Cleveland Browns. Stefanski went on to lead the Cleveland Browns to its first playoff berth since the 2002 NFL season while also taking home Coach of the year honors. Unfortunately for the Vikings, they went on to finish with a 7-9 overall record which was their worst since 2014 and the Vikings failed to make the playoffs.

description: Vikings Draft 2021: Four-round risk-reward mock draft : What would a Minnesota Vikings draft look like if they draft players with question marks? Boom or bust prospects could shape Minnesota's future. - Page 2
intro: When the Minnesota Vikings are on the clock in this year’s NFL Draft, they will have a lot of good players to choose from with a run on quarterbacks expected to come early on. What if they decide to take a gamble on upside rather than more proven players as they shape the roster for next season? The draft is often filled with future superstars that do not always pan out for several reasons, whether on the field or off of it. This year’s talent pool is no different as there are already a number of players with question marks next to their names.

description: Minnesota Vikings 7-round 2021 NFL mock draft: Vikings trade back : The Minnesota Vikings look to trade down from the 14th overall pick in the 2021 NFL Draft in order to address their offensive and defensive line struggles. - Page 2
intro: After a disappointing 7-9 record, the Minnesota Vikings landed the 14th overall pick in the 2021 NFL Draft. Minnesota entered the draft with a total of 10 picks, six of which fall between rounds three and four. With significant draft capital and no second-round pick, the Vikings are in a strong position to trade back in the first round. After a busy free agency period, the Vikings enter the 2021 NFL Draft with significant needs on both the offensive and defensive lines. The Vikings had one of the worst offensive lines in the NFL last season and one of the worst pass rushes defensively. While Minnesota returns Michael Pierce at defensive tackle, Danielle Hunter at end, and signed tackle Davlin Tomlinson, the Vikings do not have a set counterpart opposite Hunter.

description: Patriots make top-10 trade for a quarterback, restock defense in 7-round mock draft No. 2 : The Patriots leap into the top 10 to grab Jones, who fits their mold for rookie quarterbacks better than every other option except Justin Fields.
intro: With 10 days left before the NFL Draft, the Patriots’ plans remain as mysterious as ever. Will they trade up for a quarterback? Could they trade down? Do they view cornerback or offensive tackle as the greater long-term need? As expected, Bill Belichick was tight-lipped last week in his annual pre-draft press conference, the last time he’ll speak before the Pats make a selection. But reading between the lines of his answers, and surveying the landscapes of college talent and team needs, here is our latest projection of what the front office will do come draft weekend.

description: Patriots Mock Draft 2021: 7 rounds to return New England to championship contention : After an uncharacteristic free-agency frenzy, how do the New England Patriots continue their rebuild in this 7-Round 2021 Mock Draft?
intro: The New England Patriots were the jilted beau of the 2020 NFL season. While they sat and watched Tom Brady adorn his new romance with a shiny piece of finger candy, the Patriots sat in the wreckage of their broken relationship. The worst record of the Bill Belichick era resulted in New England missing the playoffs for the first time since 2008. Belichick’s response? Attack free agency and the 2021 NFL Draft like never before. In this 7-Round 2021 Patriots Mock Draft, they continue to build what they hope will be a Super Bowl-caliber roster to return the Patriots to championship contention once more.

description: Patriots 2021 NFL mock draft 3.0: Bill Belichick shocks the NFL : In this 2021 NFL Mock Draft, the New England Patriots select a couple of quarterbacks in the second and third round as Bill Belichick gets bold. - Page 2
intro: The biggest spotlight in the 2021 NFL Draft will be on New England Patriots head coach Bill Belichick and rightfully so. The 69-year-old quarterback has already spent in free agency like he has never done before.  He won’t admit it, but it is because of prior failed drafts highlighted by Patriots’ owner Robert Kraft. So, what will GM Belichick do to atone for mistakes of NFL Draft past?

description: New England Patriots seven-round 2021 NFL Mock Draft
intro: Last year, the New England Patriots and Bill Belichick experienced their first losing season since 2000. The organization responded by shelling out several massive contracts in free agency. Despite the new additions, New England faces an uphill battle in the NFC East and might elect to draft for the future. Even after re-signing Cam Newton, the Patriots don’t have a long-term solution at quarterback. The team’s long-time leaders, like Julian Edelman and Devin McCourty, are entering the final seasons of their celebrated careers, while Stephon Gilmore and Dont’a Hightower hope for a few more peak years. This franchise needs a promising crop of new leaders.

description: New England Patriots: Final 7-round 2021 NFL mock draft : Will the New England Patriots continue to be aggressive with their moves this offseason? Find out in this seven-round 2021 NFL mock draft for the team.
intro: The New England Patriots may be one of the most interesting teams to watch on Thursday night. Despite their typically conservative nature, the Patriots have been ultra-aggressive this offseason, making many key additions to the roster. Will their aggressiveness continue in the 2021 NFL Draft? It is certainly something to keep an eye on. With the draft nearly here, let’s take one last look at a potential haul for the New England Patriots. In this seven-round 2021 NFL mock draft, Bill Belichick and company look to improve their chances to compete for championships both now and in the future.

description: 2021 NFL Mock Draft: Patriots fans target quarterback, cornerback early : Fans are always quick to point out players they would draft if given the opportunity. Well, our Phil Perry gave Patriot Nation every chance to be heard with his crowd-sourced NFL mock draft.
intro: We've done plenty of NFL mock drafts ourselves. And no, we're not done. But last week felt like the perfect time to put the mock controls in your hands, as we've done each of the last few years as the end of April inches closer. The mechanics here are simple enough. First, we pop open the Pro Football Focus mock draft simulator. Then, with each Patriots pick -- starting at No. 15 overall and moving through all seven rounds -- we present you four options from which to choose via Twitter poll. From there, it's all yours.

description: New Orleans Saints seven-round 2021 NFL Mock Draft : The New Orleans Saints enter the 2021 NFL Draft on shaky ground after a massive wave of offseason departures and Drew Brees' retirement.
intro: The New Orleans Saints bid farewell to legendary quarterback Drew Brees this offseason. Sean Payton’s team enters its post-Brees stage without a defined course. New Orleans sold out for a Super Bowl over the past several years and came up empty-handed. It’s time to deal with the consequences and begin picking up the pieces as a new era dawns in New Orleans. The Saints don’t have an easy path back to the postseason in 2021. Taysom Hill and Jameis Winston could split time at quarterback, and the roster is still hurting from several costly cuts because of salary cap restrictions. Payton must replace expensive veteran talent with promising rookie labor if his team wants a shot at making the playoffs.

description: New Orleans Saints 7-Round NFL Mock Draft : Every pick for the New Orleans Saints in the upcoming NFL Draft.
intro: General managers should study the New Orleans Saints to see how they managed to get under the salary cap while keeping their most talented players on the roster. That is of course, their most talented players on the roster except for newly retired quarterback Drew Brees. The Saints need a quarterback again: Taysom Hill and Jameis Winston aren’t the long-term answer. With eight picks in the 2021 NFL Draft, the Saints could take some swings to get their quarterback. Unless they perform a massive trade up from pick 28, none of these potential quarterbacks are going to be locks to be the franchise quarterback.

description: 2021 NFL Mock Draft
intro: The Giants only have six picks in the seven rounds of the 2021 NFL Draft, which is just “fine” with GM Dave Gettleman. After all, it’s the quality that matters, not the quantity. Plus, Gettleman is fine with what he got for some of the picks he gave up. He gave up the Giants’ fifth-rounder to the Jets in the Leonard Williams trade and their seventh-rounder to the Broncos for cornerback Isaac Yiadom. He also got back an extra sixth-rounder from the Arizona Cardinals for linebacker Markus Golden. The limited number of picks left just puts the pressure on him to use those six picks well. Here’s a look at how those six picks might go:

description:
Giants NFL Mock Draft 3.0: Risky pass-rusher follows Jaylen Waddle pick : 


No matter what happens in the first round of the 2021 NFL Draft, only 10 players can be taken before the Giants make their pick at No. 11. So, when so many...
intro: No matter what happens in the first round of the 2021 NFL Draft, only 10 players can be taken before the Giants make their pick at No. 11. So, when so many draft fanatics (you know who you are) cry out “He won’t be there at No. 11!” when one of these Mock Draft exercises gets carried out, sometimes it is an accurate sentiment and often it is not. For those who cannot fathom this player or that player on the board when the Giants are on the clock, take a deep breath. There should be at least four quarterbacks taken in the top 10 picks. After that, almost anything goes.

description: NY Jets trade up for OL in 7-round 2021 NFL Mock Draft : The NY Jets traded up for offensive lineman Teven Jenkins in our latest seven-round 2021 NFL Mock Draft. What else did they do? - Page 2
intro: This is it. We’ve reached the home stretch. The NY Jets and the rest of the NFL are less than five days away from the start of what could prove to be a monumental 2021 NFL Draft. Franchise directions will be determined. Dreams will be accomplished. And we’re sure to see our fair share of typical draft drama before the weekend is over. For frequent readers of these mocks, you will know that we’ve been running this series essentially weekly for nearly seven months now. When you have a team as bad as the Jets were last year, it only makes sense.

description: 2021 NFL Mock Draft
intro: The NFL Draft kicks off at 8 p.m. next Thursday, but it really doesn’t start until pick three, and maybe pick four. We know what the top two picks are, at least. We know what position is going third. And yes, one of those picks will be the Jets taking BYU quarterback Zach Wilson. There’s no reason to overthink that one, at least. As for the rest of their draft activity, here’s my latest prediction in my penultimate, three-round mock draft, version 8.0:

description: New York Jets mock draft: Full seven-rounder with trades : This New York Jets mock draft has the team taking quarterback Zach Wilson at No. 2. That's obvious. However, check out what we have them doing later.
intro: The New York Jets will be selecting No. 2 overall in the 2021 NFL Draft. By now, it’s pretty clear that they will take BYU quarterback Zach Wilson with that selection after the team traded away Sam Darnold. Below, we look at a full seven-round New York Jets mock draft with one notable trade. Keep in mind that this mock is being conducted under the guise of the Pro Football Network simulator. In no way does this mean all of these players will be available when the Jets are slated to pick in late April.

description: Eagles Mock Draft: Projecting each of Philadelphia's 11 picks in 2021 NFL Draft : Here's a complete breakdown of Sporting News' seven-round mock draft projecting all of the Eagles' picks in the 2021 NFL Draft.
intro: The Eagles are operating with 11 picks in the 2021 NFL Draft. They used to have a top-10 selection to start in the first round, but after trades involving the 49ers, Dolphins and them, their first time on the clock on the night of April 29 will be at No. 12 overall. Philadelphia will follow that with three picks on Day 2, a second-rounder and two third-rounders, the last of which comes from the Carson Wentz trade with the Colts. The team closes with seven picks on Day 3, with four coming well after No. 200 overall.

description: Philadelphia Eagles 7-round 2021 NFL mock draft : The Philadelphia Eagles enter the 2021 NFL Draft with a new head coach and quarterback. How can they improve their roster? - Page 2
intro: After a disappointing 4-11-1 record, the Philadelphia Eagles landed the sixth overall pick in the 2021 NFL Draft. Philadelphia decided to clean house during the offseason, firing head coach Doug Pederson and trading Carson Wentz to Indianapolis. The Eagles decided to trade the sixth overall pick to Miami in exchange for the 12th overall pick in this draft and an additional first-rounder in the 2022 NFL Draft. The Eagles could have as many as three first-round picks in the 2022 NFL Draft depending on the impact Wentz makes with the Colts during the 2021 season. After trading back from the sixth spot, General Manager Howie Roseman could look to move back into the first round of the 2021 NFL Draft depending on how the draft board falls on April 29.

description: NFL Mock Draft 2021: Final 7-round picks for the Eagles : How did I do?
intro: The 2021 NFL Draft is TOMORROW and that means it’s time to unveil my first and only Philadelphia Eagles 7-round mock draft. I know you’ve all been waiting for this moment. To note, we used The Draft Network’s simulator for this exercise. I also discussed my picks with Jimmy Kempski — who revealed his final mock as well — on the latest BGN Radio podcast episode, which you can listen to below or by [clicking here]:

description: Philadelphia Eagles, seven-round mock draft: Picking 12th : Who will the Philadelphia Eagles select now that they have traded back to pick 12? It might be obvious given the new schemes on both sides of the ball. - Page 2
intro: There was plenty of speculation about whether or not the Philadelphia Eagles would trade back from the sixth pick on draft night. They instead did so earlier than expected. General manager and vice president Howie Roseman made the move by trading away the sixth overall pick and a fifth-round pick (156th overall) in exchange for the Miami Dolphins’ 12th overall pick, fourth-round pick (123rd overall), and their 2022 first-round pick. This news came after the San Francisco 49ers traded up to acquire the Dolphins third-overall pick.

description: 2021 NFL mock draft: Eagles trade up for Florida tight end Kyle Pitts : The Eagles grab the ultimate offensive weapon in this seven-round 2021 NFL mock draft. By: Shamus Clancy
intro: The Eagles grab the ultimate offensive weapon in this seven-round 2021 NFL mock draft. By: Shamus Clancy

description: Final Eagles-only 2021 seven-round mock draft : The 2021 NFL Draft is now only two days away, so let's go ahead and put out our final Philadelphia Eagles-only mock draft of the season. As a reminder, after various trades, the Eagles currently have 11 draft picks this year, with two in the third round, three in the sixth round, and two in the seventh round.
intro: The 2021 NFL Draft is now two days away, so let's go ahead and put out our final Philadelphia Eagles-only mock draft of the season. As a reminder, after various trades, the Eagles currently have 11 draft picks this year, with two in the third round, three in the sixth round, and two in the seventh round.

description: Philadelphia Eagles 7-round mock draft: Trading up for future starters : Knowing Howie Roseman and his tendency to be aggressive with picks, I wouldn't rule out multiple trade-ups for the Philadelphia Eagles during the draft.
intro: Having already pulled off one trade when it comes to this year’s NFL Draft, Howie Roseman and the Philadelphia Eagles tend to be busier than most teams when it comes to shuffling around their draft picks. They moved back to get Dallas Goedert in 2018, they moved up to get Andre Dillard in 2019, they used some later round picks in 2020 to gather future value, and they of course used the sixth overall pick to obtain a future first-rounder via the Miami Dolphins earlier this offseason.

description: Philadelphia Eagles seven-round 2021 NFL Mock Draft
intro: The Philadelphia Eagles suffered an unceremonious collapse last season that saw the Super Bowl LII victors finish last in the historically bad NFC East with a 4-11-1 record. Early in the offseason, general manager Howie Roseman and team owner Jeffrey Lurie moved on from head coach Doug Pederson and franchise quarterback Carson Wentz. New coach Nick Sirianni takes over a team in turmoil and faces arguably the most challenging task in the NFL: pleasing Philadelphia’s fanbase on draft day.

description: Philadelphia Eagles most ideal picks in every round of 2021 NFL Draft : The Philadelphia Eagles need to be aggressive in the 2021 NFL Draft, and here are the most ideal prospects in every round they'll be selecting in. - Page 2
intro: Okay, just one more Philadelphia Eagles seven-round mock draft. Let’s get straight to the point. The 2021 NFL Draft is upon us and fans are in search of any and every mock draft they can get their hands on. The Philadelphia Eagles have a ton of holes and a ton of draft capital to play with. Expect them to make a few moves and some surprising trades, including a trade that includes arguably the best tight end to ever wear the midnight green, one by the name of Zach Ertz.

description: 2021 NFL mock draft: Eagles go defense heavy in early rounds : In his final Eagles-only mock draft, Dave Zangaro has the Eagles going heavy on defense early.
intro: In his final Eagles-only mock draft, Dave Zangaro has the Eagles going heavy on defense early.

description: Philadelphia Eagles mock draft: Full 7-round 2021 NFL Draft projection with trades : With the 2021 NFL Draft approaching, our Philadelphia Eagles mock draft shows how the team can start the rebuild on a positive note.
intro: As the 2021 NFL Draft draws closer, it’s time for a Philadelphia Eagles mock draft to project out just how general manager Howie Roseman could begin to reshape this roster so it becomes competitive in the near future. It’s certainly been a wild offseason in Philadelphia. The Eagles fired Super Bowl-winning coach Doug Pederson, traded away star quarterback Carson Wentz and stunningly moved down from the No. 6 overall pick. With so many moving parts and plenty of roster turnover, it becomes even more crucial to really nail the upcoming NFL Draft. Fans have plenty of reason to question whether Roseman is the man for the job. After all, this is the same general manager who has drafted one Pro Bowl player since 2013 and went after one of the team’s stars in 2018. But let’s try and take a positive approach with hope for the future.

description: Ray Fittipaldo's final seven-round Steelers mock draft : The Steelers look to bolster their offense in the first few rounds of the 2021 draft.
intro: By consistently making the playoffs over the years the Steelers are well-versed at drafting near the bottom of the first round. They own the No. 24 overall selection Thursday night, and in recent years, selecting later in the first round has produced a mixed bag of results. Over the past decade, it’s been boom or bust for the Steelers. They selected Cam Heyward at No. 31 overall in 2011, David DeCastro at No. 24 in 2021 and T.J. Watt at No. 30 in 2017. All three players have been All-Pros in recent years and have been foundational pieces for the Steelers.

description: Steelers land blue chip players in 7-round 2021 NFL Mock Draft : The Pittsburgh Steelers are in need of a youth movement following the exit of two offensive linemen. Can they land that here in this mock draft? - Page 2
intro: After getting out to a super hot 11-0 start in the 2020 season, the Pittsburgh Steelers early-season success disappeared after losing four of the next five games. After finishing with a 12-4 record in the regular season the Steelers drew their divisional rival in the Cleveland Browns in the Wildcard round where they ultimately lost, ending their season. While many thought last season could’ve been Ben Roethlisberger’s last season he is slated to return for another season as the Steelers lead man. The Steelers haven’t made any major signings so far this offseason but have done a good job of resigning some of their depth players while also bringing back a few starters for another shot with the franchise. With limited cap space to go big fish hunting, the Steelers have had to take a more calculated approach with who they’ve brought in due to the financial restrictions.

description: Steelers final 2021 seven-round mock draft with trades : The Steelers will have many final mock drafts come out but if they can make this one a reality, then they will have a bright future.
intro: The Steelers have a lot of work to do in this draft but they can accomplish this monumental task. They will need to be creative to address their needs with impactful prospects going forward. They need to find starters at the running back, center, tackle, and corner positions. Even though they need to find instant impact players at those listed above, they also need to address depth concerns at other places on this roster. Positions like a tight end, outside linebacker, and safety need to be addressed before the season begins. Now, the team could always circle back to free agency if they wish to before or after the draft but it seems like they want to address these issues with one of their many selections.

description: Pittsburgh Steelers find immediate starters in 7-round mock draft : In this Pittsburgh Steelers 7-round mock draft, they fill some key positional needs early who may see the field at high volume to start the 2021 season.
intro: With the first pick for the Pittsburgh Steelers in this mock draft, they go with Travis Etienne. Etienne was a high-profile prospect last year but decided to go back one more year and play for the Clemson Tigers in 2020. Etienne was a home-runner hitter in college and mad dashing plays all over the field. Etienne is dangerous in the run and pass game, adding a running back like Etienne early with help with the poor run game and add versatility to the Steelers offense.

description: 2021 NFL draft: Trade down highlights Steelers 7-round mock draft : The Steelers trade out of the first round and still score an elite prospect.
intro: At this point, when the Pittsburgh Steelers go on the clock in the first round of the 2021 NFL draft, there are going to be a significant number of options for the Steelers with that pick. So many in fact, it makes perfect sense the Steelers would at least entertain the idea of a trade back. This is exactly what I did in this latest simulation. In fact, I made multiple trades in this simulation to see just how things should shake out. Here is our latest seven-round mock draft update.

description: Carney: 2021 Steelers' Mock Draft (Final Version) - Steelers Depot : Sitting less than a week away from the 2021 NFL Draft, the seemingly endless cycle of speculation and debate is about to come for an end – for the time
intro: Sitting less than a week away from the 2021 NFL Draft, the seemingly endless cycle of speculation and debate is about to come for an end – for the time being, anyway. After addressing some holes in free agency, the Pittsburgh Steelers are in a decent position heading into the draft April 29-May 1 in Cleveland. Knowing that some holes have been plugged following some surprise returns by Tyson Alualu and Vince Williams, among others, there’s some clear-cut needs for the Steelers in the draft.

description: 2021 NFL Mock Draft: Determining all 8 Pittsburgh Steelers selections : Playing Steelers GM for a day, a group of loyal BTSC podcast viewers helped select the Steelers eight picks in a full seven-round draft simulation
intro: On Tuesday night’s BTSC podcast of The Scho Bro Show, we held a mock draft simulation where those in attendance as part of our live chat on YouTube or Facebook got to chime in to help make the Steelers picks. The simulation was done through thedraftnetwork.com and used their player rankings to select the other 31 NFL franchise’s picks while we chose those of the Steelers. Before getting into the selections, we realize the chances of getting any, let alone all, of the selections correct is a very long shot. In last year‘s exercise where the Steelers did not have a first-round pick, we did not correctly select any players taken by the Steelers. The draft plays out in strange ways, and a player we selected in the fifth round was taken three spots before Alex Highsmith in the third round. This is what makes watching the draft so exciting and entertaining as you never know what is going to happen.

description: Pittsburgh Steelers: Complete seven-round 2021 NFL mock draft : What can the Pittsburgh Steelers do in the 2021 NFL Draft to improve? Find out in this complete seven-round 2021 NFL mock draft for the team.
intro: With Ben Roethlisberger back in the fold, the Pittsburgh Steelers are clearly looking to make a long postseason run next season. While Roethlisberger is not what he once was, this is still a talented team that could legitimately compete if they catch a few breaks. That being said, there is less margin for error than the Steelers are used to having. Let’s be honest, this is an aging team that will have a tough time making a legitimate Super Bowl run in 2021. However, with a strong showing in the draft, the Steelers could have a chance. In this seven-round 2021 NFL mock draft, the Pittsburgh Steelers look to continue to put together a roster that helps them immediately compete while also having an eye on the future. Let’s see how they do.

description: Steelers Mock Draft: Projecting each of Pittsburgh's 8 picks in 2021 NFL Draft : Here's a complete breakdown of Sporting News' seven-round mock draft projecting all of the Steelers' picks in the 2021 NFL Draft.
intro: The Steelers have a critical 2021 NFL Draft coming off a return to the AFC playoffs. They took back the North with a 12-4 record, but they ended losing their wild-card game to the Browns badly and the runner-up Ravens also advanced to the divisional round. Ben Roethlisbeger and the offense fought through some limitations. The defense was the foundation for much of the success and battled well through injuries.

description: San Francisco 49ers 7-round mock draft with trades : A 7-round mock draft complete with trades for the San Francisco 49ers.
intro: It’s time for our final mock of the pre-draft process with less than a week left until the NFL draft. This time our jaunt over to the Pro Football Focus mock draft simulator will involve a seven-round mock, which deviates from the previous editions where we kept it to only the first few rounds. A quick look at the 49ers’ roster shows they may not need all nine of their picks, and some maneuvering around the board could allow them to walk away with a more quality class. We did our best to simulate a few trades to try and get a grasp on how San Francisco’s seven rounds might shake out.

description: 49ers 7-round mock 2021 NFL Draft with only Big Ten players : The 2021 NFL Draft is near, which allows plenty of time to continue to predict who the 49ers might draft but using all players from the same conference. - Page 2
intro: The madness of NFL Draft season is almost over, with the draft just about two weeks away and the San Francisco 49ers holding the No. 3 overall selection in the first round. The trade that got the Niners from No. 12 to No. 3 has sparked a lot of debate over which of the quarterbacks not named Trevor Lawrence or Zach Wilson the team should take with the third pick. But there are, of course, eight other picks the Niners have to use in this draft, barring the inevitable moving and shaking from general manager John Lynch, which means there are eight players who aren’t Justin Fields or Trey Lance or Mac Jones who’ll be 49ers by the end of the day on May 1.

description: 49ers seven-round 2021 NFL mock draft includes trades, big steal : The 49ers will draft a QB at No. 3, but how will they improve the roster during the rest of the 2021 NFL Draft. Josh Schrock offers his final seven-round mock draft.
intro: Against all odds, we finally made it to the 2021 NFL Draft. Ever since the 49ers made their blockbuster trade to move up to No. 3 overall, the NFL world has been focused on trying to psychoanalyze Kyle Shanahan's quarterback preference and tried to determine which signal-caller he has his eyes on as the 49ers prepare to make a franchise-altering trade. We know they will be quarterback hunting at No. 3 overall, but will they call Mac Jones, Justin Fields or Trey Lance's name? The winds currently are pointing to Jones being the favorite, but all three still remain realistic possibilities to be the 49ers' next franchise QB.

description: 49ers Mock Draft 2021: Returning San Francisco to Super Bowl contention : Any 2021 7-Round Mock Draft for the San Francisco 49ers has its success begin and end with the third overall pick. Which QB do they take?
intro: The San Francisco 49ers are such a fascinating piece of this 2021 NFL Draft class. Since Kyle Shanahan’s arrival, the team has won 6, 4, 13, and 6 games. Yet with minimal tangible success, the view of Shanahan suggests he’s an elite coach. From a schematic standpoint, that is tough to debate. His run scheme, along with the likes of Sean McVay, has revolutionized the run game and embarrassed NFL defenses in the past few seasons. With this 2021 7-Round 49ers Mock Draft, it’s important to get the right quarterback and hopefully find a starting cornerback. After that, it’s all about finding diamonds in the rough. And I’d be remiss not to mention that, in 2017, starting quarterback Jimmy Garoppolo started in just six games (5-0 in those starts). In 2018, he only played in three games due to injury. Then, in 2020, he only played in six once again. So don’t worry, San Francisco, you do actually have a good head coach. It isn’t easy to win games with… whatever that backup quarterback situation has been over the years.

description: The Tooth's 2021 49ers Mock Draft - Full 7 Rounds • IDP Guys : The 49ers made a huge trade for a quarterback on draft day. Here is a a 49ers mock draft of how I think their draft day will pan out.
intro: If there was any leash left on Jimmy Garoppolo, it just became incredibly short — the 49ers have made it apparent that they are ready to move on. They just traded their 12th overall in 2021, 2022 first and third-round picks, as well as a 2023 first-round pick to move up to third overall. Obviously, they have their eyes set on their quarterback of the future. I am a huge 49ers fan, and I am very intrigued with how this draft will set up the 49ers moving forward. Here is my 7 round 49ers mock draft for 2021.

description: Constructing the perfect Seahawks 2021 NFL Mock Draft : The Seahawks are currently sitting with just three selections this year.
intro: There’s a little more than two weeks until the 2021 NFL Draft and the Seahawks are currently sitting with just three selections: Pick Nos. 56 (2nd round), 130 (4th round) and 252 (7th round). Over the weekend, I teamed up with Trevor Sikkema from The Draft Network for a live mock draft in which we constructed the best possible outcome for the Seahawks. We used TDN’s mock draft machine that contains a trade feature. Below is a look at the results of the mock as well as the details of the one trade we executed.

description: Seattle Seahawks 7-Round NFL Mock Draft : Every pick for the Seattle Seahawks in the upcoming NFL Draft.
intro: The NFL Draft is just days away, and one of the teams that are set to make a Super Bowl run is the Seattle Seahawks. With holes to fill on both the offensive and defensive side of the ball, the Seahawks will have to nail this draft in hopes to capitalize on their current Super Bowl window. They don't have many picks (three picks total), which means hitting on these picks will be vital.

description: Seahawks Mock Draft 2021: Seven-round projections : Looking forward to the 2021 NFL Draft? Here's an in-depth look at what the Seahawks will do.
intro: With the help of Pro Football Focus’ mock draft simulator, I was able to complete a full draft as Seattle’s general manager. Here’s my projections for what the Seahawks will do in the upcoming 2021 NFL Draft:

description: Tampa Bay Buccaneers 7-Round NFL Mock Draft : Every pick for the Tampa Bay Buccaneers in the upcoming NFL Draft.
intro: The Buccaneers are in a unique spot. They are in all-out win-now mode, but they have few needs, as they return all 22 starters from last season. It doesn’t look like quarterback Tom Brady is hanging up the cleats anytime soon, so Tampa Bay will be looking to add a few pieces that can help them over the next few years. Here is what the Buccaneers can do to push them over the edge and win another Super Bowl ring.

description: Tampa Bay Buccaneers seven-round 2021 NFL Mock Draft : The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have everything. They’re Super Bowl champions that somehow retained all of their contributors and could add more.
intro: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have everything. They’re Super Bowl champions that somehow retained all of their contributors, except for Antonio Brown, in an offseason where contending teams bled veteran contracts for cap space. Bruce Arians and Tom Brady seem primed for another title run, and a draft class full of immediate contributors could boost their cause. Many fans believe Brady’s Buccaneers peaked late in the regular season, heading into the playoffs. I’d argue they peaked after the season ended, when general manager Jason Licht executed a masterful offseason plan that brought back multiple All-Pros while still leaving Tampa Bay financial wiggle room. I wonder what the front office will do for an encore.

description: Buccaneers Mock Draft: Projecting each of Tampa Bay's 7 picks in 2021 NFL Draft : Here's a complete breakdown of Sporting News' seven-round mock draft projecting all of the Buccaneers' picks in the 2021 NFL Draft.
intro: The Buccaneers go into the 2021 NFL Draft with no pressing needs coming off their winning Super Bowl 55 run. After Tampa Bay's big moves kept the team together in free agency for Tom Brady, it can go into 'best player available' mode and stash the most appealing prospects for the future. There's nothing surprising about how the Bucs pick from April 29-May 1. They start with the last pick in the first round and follow that with six more, one each in round. Here's how Sporting News projects the Bucs' selections from Round 1 through Round 7:

description: 2021 NFL mock draft: Final 7-round projections for Bucs : Bucs Wire editor Luke Easterling makes his final seven-round projections for the Tampa Bay Buccaneers in the 2021 NFL draft
intro: NFL draft week is finally here, so it’s time to put the finishing touches on our projections for the Tampa Bay Buccaneers in this year’s event. The Bucs don’t have any glaring needs after bringing back their entire starting lineup from last year’s Super Bowl team, but they should still be focused on building young depth for the future, and hopefully still landing some instant-impact players like they did in last year’s draft. Here are our final projections for all of Tampa Bay’s eight picks in the 2021 NFL draft:

description: 2021 NFL Draft: Buccaneers trade up for rising star in new mock draft : The 2021 NFL Draft is only a few weeks away, and the Buccaneers have an opportunity to make waves on draft night by making a risky trade. - Page 2
intro: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are still the team to beat going into the 2021 NFL Draft. After bringing back all of their starters and signing pass-catching running back Giovani Bernard to a great deal, the team is set to dominate the NFL next season even if they draft no rookies. While the thought of passing on any rookies is laughable, there is some truth to the belief that the Bucs have too many picks this season. Rookies have a hard time making any NFL team, not to mention on one that just won the Super Bowl and is bringing back all of their key starters.

description: Tennessee Titans 7-round 2021 NFL mock draft : Happy draft day! What better way to celebrate (or kill time until 8pm ET) than to read through my final Titans 7-round mock draft? There are a number of ways the Titans can go tonight, which adds...
intro: Happy draft day! What better way to celebrate (or kill time until 8pm ET) than to read through my final Titans 7-round mock draft? There are a number of ways the Titans can go tonight, which adds to the excitement and anxiety of the fan base. The Titans have four picks in the Top 100, or the first three rounds. It’s imperative that they find some immediate contributors with these picks. Some positions could use starters. Others need depth and rotational players.

description: Tennessee Titans dueling 7-round mock drafts 3.0 : In our latest version of dueling mock drafts for the Tennessee Titans, we tasked our writers with picking a specific position in Round 1.
intro: With the 2021 NFL draft a little over two weeks away, we decided to take part in another duel of seven-round mock drafts for the Tennessee Titans, but this time around there we had some different stipulations. In this version, we tasked each of our writers with selecting a player at a specific position based on the Titans’ biggest needs. To make things more interesting, there were no do-overs and we used mock draft simulators.

description: 2021 NFL Mock Draft: Tennessee Titans Edition : This Tennessee Titans NFL mock draft provides a quick look into what the front office might do this year. With a few holes on the roster, the Titans have a chance to fill their needs, while being competitive in the league.

description: Most realistic Tennessee Titans 7-round 2021 NFL Mock Draft : We know a lot about Jon Robinson and his tendencies. Using all of that knowledge, this is the most realistic 2021 NFL mock draft for the Tennessee Titans. - Page 2
intro: The Tennessee Titans aren’t an open book when it comes to their game plan for any NFL Draft. In fact, up until recently, it has been very hard for prognosticators to get a read on the front office and their plans each offseason. Still, if you are successful long enough then people will start to figure out trends in your behavior. Make no mistake, Jon Robinson has been one of the best general managers in the NFL since taking over and the Titans have the stats to prove it. Since Robinson’s reign started in Tennessee, the Titans have had five-straight winning seasons. They’re one of only three teams who can say that, and all of that came even though Robinson took over a team that was 5-27 in two seasons before he got the job.

description: Tennessee Titans full seven-round 2021 NFL mock draft : The annual selection meeting draws near. Here's a full seven-round Tennessee Titans mock draft to whet the whistle if you're a fan. - Page 2
intro: Well NFL fans, we’ve made it. The end of April is nearing, and that means we’re all on the doorstep of another draft. For the fans of all 32 professional football franchises, the annual selection meeting has taken on a life of its own. For the Tennessee Titans and their fans, it represents even more. This is a chance to erase a stain that’s been on their minds since the Wild Card Round of last season’s AFC Playoffs. No one’s forgotten about that loss to the Baltimore Ravens, and in all honesty, if the fans are fuming, you know that game weighs heavily on the minds of the guys who were on that team.

description: Titans Mock Draft 2021: Can Tennessee round out their team? | PFN : The Titans want to take the next step. In this Titans 7-Round 2021 NFL Mock Draft, can they round out their team to do just that?
intro: Despite a tough loss to Lamar Jackson and the Ravens in the 2020 NFL Playoffs, this team has some pieces to build upon. Derrick Henry and A.J. Brown are the base of that, but they have some significant holes to fill across the team as well. While the EDGE presence should be better with Bud Dupree in town, the losses of Corey Davis, Jonnu Smith, and a serious problem at cornerback are clear as day. In this Titans 7-Round 2021 NFL Mock Draft, the Titans try to null those voids through the 2021 NFL Draft to make another Super Bowl run.
